data.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
               <jats:p>Active-set approaches are commonly used in algorithms for constrained numerical optimization. We propose that active-set techniques can beneficially be employed for evolutionary black-box optimization with explicit constraints and present an active-set evolution strategy. We experimentally evaluate its performance relative to those of several algorithms for constrained optimization and find that the active-set evolution strategy compares favourably for the problem set under consideration.</jats:p>
data.title: Active Sets for Explicitly Constrained Evolutionary Optimization
